case.title: Board of Ed. of City School Dist. of New York v. Tom F.

opinion.p: 552 U. S. ____ (2007) 552 U. S. ____ (2007) 552 U. S. ____ (2007) SUPREME COURT OF THE UNITED STATES BOARD OF EDUCATION OF THE CITY SCHOOL DISTRICT OF THE CITY OF NEW YORK, PETITIONER v. TOM F., on behalf of GILBERT F., a minor child
on writ of certiorari to the united states court of appeals for the second circuit
The judgment is affirmed by an equally divided Court.
Justice Kennedy took no part in the decision of this case.
